fields.label: Header source
fields.rationale: HTML lets the header adapt to page layout and supports Jinja. Image uses an uploaded image file (flat, no templating). If source='Image' and the image field is set, set_image() auto-converts the attachment into HTML and stores it in the content field at validate time - the conversion is one-way.

fields.label: Footer source
fields.rationale: Same HTML vs Image choice as header, but scoped to the footer. Footer visibility in non-PDF renders is unreliable; design for the PDF path.

fields.label: Header HTML (when source='HTML')
fields.rationale: HTML for the document header (logo, company name, address, contact block). Jinja-templated; `doc` context is available when rendered inside a Print Format. Empty means no header body.

fields.label: Footer HTML (when footer_source='HTML')
fields.rationale: HTML for the document footer (page number, legal disclaimer, bank details). Jinja-templated; footer only renders reliably in PDF output - preview pages may show it differently.

fields.label: Header image (when source='Image')
fields.rationale: Attach Image file path. When source='Image' and this field is set at save time, set_image() auto-generates an HTML snippet into the content field with dimensions from image_height / image_width if provided.

fields.label: Header alignment
fields.rationale: Default Left. Center / Right shift the HTML-wrapped content within the page margin.

fields.label: Default letter head
fields.rationale: Site-wide singleton: setting is_default=1 auto-clears is_default on every other Letter Head. If the current default is deleted, the next Letter Head saved auto-becomes the default (on_update forces is_default=1 when no other default exists). A Letter Head cannot be both disabled=1 AND is_default=1 - the controller rejects that combo.

fields.label: Disabled
fields.rationale: Default enabled. Disabled letter heads are hidden from Print Format dropdowns. Cannot be combined with is_default=1.
